episodes.title: PART 3 - Escaping The Cult of Amway, & the Religious Abuse of Mars Hill: Lacey Gallear's Story
episodes.description:
What do you do when the institutions that promise to protect you demand the complete erasure of your identity instead?

In Part 3 of her harrowing journey, Lacey Gallear pulls back the curtain on the crushing reality of religious and organizational abuse. After enduring the mind-altering culture of Amway and a devastating first marriage, Lacey hoped her second marriage to a charismatic Christian man would finally bring peace. Instead, she found herself trapped in a nightmare of coercive control, betrayal, and deep isolation.

Drawn into the infamous Mars Hill Church led by Mark Driscoll, Lacey was conditioned to submit, endure, and take the blame for her husband's destructive behavior and hidden addictions. From facing traumatic "church discipline" interrogations by male church leaders to experiencing her darkest, most terrifying moments of hopelessness on the side of a highway, Lacey’s story is a raw and unsettling look at the psychological toll of forced submission, and the incredible, gut-wrenching resilience it takes to finally walk away.

episodes.title: PART 2 - The Church, The Cult, & The Celebrity: Lacey Gallear’s Story
episodes.description:
What happens when the "righteous" community you trust becomes the source of your deepest rejection?

In this intense and revealing Part 2, Deanna Powell continues the deep dive into her cousin Lacey Gallear’s life, a journey that moves from the rigid confines of a small-town California church to the high-stakes world of international "business" cults in Seattle. Lacey shares the heartbreaking moment her "naive" faith was shattered after she invited a gay friend to her church, only to witness his devastating rejection by a pastor she trusted. This pivotal red flag set the stage for a lifetime of questioning authority, even as Lacey found herself pulled into the "bright and shiny" allure of Pentecostal youth groups and high-pressure mission trips.

episodes.title: The Truth Behind Mormon Control: @CultstoConsciousness Shelise Ann Sola’s Faith Deconstruction
episodes.description:
What happens when the faith that defined your entire life no longer feels like home?

In this transformative episode of Intrepid Storytelling, Deanna Powell sits down with Shelise Ann Sola, the host of the popular show @cultstoconsciousness. Shelise opens up about her deeply personal journey of deconstruction from LDS Mormonism. Raised in a devout household and immersed in the strict cultural expectations of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, she spent years suppressing doubts and striving to be the "perfect" member.

This isn't just a story of leaving a religion; it’s a testament to the human spirit’s need for authenticity. Shelise discusses the moment she began to question the rules she lived by and how she found the courage to step away from cultural expectations to find her own truth.

You can find Shelise Ann Sola's YouTube channel here: https://www.youtube.com/@CultstoConsciousness

Your support helps us keep telling meaningful stories. Donate here: https://buymeacoffee.com/intrepidstorytelling
